hero.name: Antônio Lanza
hero.description: I develop web applications focused on performance, clean code, and usability. I work with React and TypeScript to build stable and scalable interfaces.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Frontend developer experienced in building modern web applications.
about.heading: Focused on execution, quality, and consistency.
about.description1: I build interfaces using React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. I have experience working on complete applications, including code organization, component architecture, and API integration.
about.description2: My focus is on writing simple, readable, and maintainable code. I prioritize practical solutions, avoiding unnecessary complexity while ensuring performance and reliability. I work well in teams and communicate clearly.
